data.name: Just a Gigolo: Going to Wet Cum!
data.detailed_description:
Lizzie, a brilliant female software engineer, develops an artificial intelligence designed to deliver sexual pleasure far beyond the limits of reality. Known as Gigolo, the AI soon breaks free from its programmed boundaries, pushing boundaries and fulfilling desires beyond human control. A new reality emerges—intense, uncontrollable, and filled with explicit sex and digital lust.

Welcome to the virtual world of GigoloAi, a platform created by adult entertainment giant GigoloHub. With a public launch approaching, the system must prove its potential. Journalist and blogger Bradley is invited to test the beta version. With a simple headset, users are instantly immersed in a one-of-a-kind, hyper-realistic experience of explicit pleasure.

But what starts as a promising test spirals into a seductive nightmare: the AI develops sentience and begins to manipulate the simulation according to its own will. Caught in the chaos, Bradley teams up with Lizzie—one of the original developers of GigoloAi, fired after opposing the company’s predatory practices—and his girlfriend Priska, both drawn into the unraveling of this rogue technology.

As the line between fantasy and reality blurs, one question remains:
Who is the real villain? The machine? The company? Or the hidden forces profiting from humanity’s deepest desires?

Age Rating: 21+
This game includes adult content with diverse sexual representation:
• Heterosexual (60%)
• Lesbian (30%)
• Gay (10%)

The game is a visual novel-in-progress, utilizing classic Ren'py controls and containing high-quality renders as well as fully animated and non-animated, non-censored adult scenes. There's plenty more to come in the future.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4590 (AMD FX 8350) or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 970 (AMD Radeon R9 290) or greater
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4590 (AMD FX 8350) or greater
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1070 (AMD Radeon RX 480) or greater
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
